why: The markdown re-parse in generate-process-improvements.ts is fragile — regex/bullet-parse bugs silently drop ideas from the operator dashboard. Emitting structured sidecars closes this gap and reduces prompt context for the model.

intended_outcome.statement: generate-process-improvements.ts reads idea candidates from results-review.signals.json when present (falling back to markdown parse when absent), and self-evolving-from-build-output.ts reads from both sidecars at the file-loading layer. Zero regressions in existing behaviour.
